data.name: Bulbasaur

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.text: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. Thus, a plant sprouted and now grows with this Pokémon.

data.name: Ivysaur

attacks.name: Poison Powder
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

data.flavor_text: When the bulb on its back grows large, the Pokémon seems to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

data.name: Venusaur

abilities.name: Energy Trans
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may move a Grass Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This Pokémon Power can't be used if this Pokémon is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

data.flavor_text: This plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Toxic Spore
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

data.name: Parasect

attacks.name: Nutritional Support
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Grass Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.flavor_text: A mushroom grown larger than the host's body controls PARASECT. It scatters poisonous spores.

data.name: Scyther

attacks.name: Swords Dance
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Slash attack does 30 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

data.flavor_text: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one of it.

data.name: Pinsir

attacks.name: Roof Fling
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, put your opponent's Active Pokémon and all attached cards into your opponent's hand.

data.flavor_text: One solid blow from its horns is enough to split apart a large tree. Its greatest rival in Alola is Vikavolt.

data.name: Sandshrew

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

data.flavor_text: It lives in areas of limited rainfall. When danger approaches, it curls up into a ball to protect its soft stomach.

data.name: Sandslash

attacks.name: Continuous Scratch
attacks.text: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Sand Tomb
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

data.flavor_text: Its claws and horns often break off. The broken claws and horns can be used to carve plows for tilling farm fields.

data.name: Onix
data.flavor_text: It usually lives underground. It searches for food while boring its way through the ground at 50 miles per hour.

data.name: Hitmonlee

attacks.name: Coordinated Strike
attacks.text: If Hitmonchan is on your Bench, this attack does 80 more damage.

data.flavor_text: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

data.name: Hitmonchan

attacks.name: Coordinated Beatdown
attacks.text: If Hitmonlee is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.

data.flavor_text: Its punches slice the air. However, it seems to need a short break after fighting for three minutes.

data.name: Doduo

attacks.name: Double Stab
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Doduo Delivery
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

data.flavor_text: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

data.name: Dodrio

abilities.name: Retreat Aid
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 2 Basic Colorless Energy less.

attacks.name: Incessant Peck
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

data.flavor_text: It collects data and plans three times as wisely, but it may think too much and fall into a state of immobility.

data.name: Chansey

attacks.name: Scrunch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 80 damage to itself.

data.flavor_text: A rare and elusive Pokémon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to catch it.

data.name: Snorlax

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Collapse
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

data.flavor_text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

attacks.name: Rising Wind
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Aero Break
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

data.name: Computer Search
rules: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.
Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: Poké Ball
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: Pokémon Fan Club
rules: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: Pokémon Nurse
rules: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon. If you healed any damage in this way, discard all Energy from that Pokémon.

data.name: Professor Oak
rules: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

data.name: Rare Candy
rules: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

data.name: Rocket's Admin
rules: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, each player draws a card for each of their remaining Prize cards.

data.name: Sun Seed
rules: The attacks used by the Venusaur this card is attached to do 100 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

data.name: Super Rod
rules: Shuffle up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

data.name: Switch
rules: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

data.name: Ultra Ball
rules: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.
Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.name: VS Seeker
rules: Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.

data.name: Double Colorless Energy
rules: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides 2 Colorless Energy.
